title: A Resolution approving the Sangguniang Barangay of Malinta Ordinance No. 001 Series of 2025, entitled "An Ordinance Subdividing Purok 1 and Purok 2 of Barangay Malinta, Los Baños, Laguna to Purok 1-A, Purok 1-B, Purok 2-A and Purok 2-B, defining their boundaries, functions and providing guidelines for their organization and operation".
